message:
fix(kubernetes): close helm/kustomize global-flags bypass

Same class bug on the remaining Kubernetes packs. Helm flags
(`--kube-context`, `--kubeconfig`, `--namespace`/`-n`, `--debug`)
and kustomize flags (`--load-restrictor`, `--enable-alpha-plugins`)
between the CLI and the subcommand broke every `<cli>\s+<sub>`
pattern in both packs.

Apply the same `<cli>\b.*?\b<sub>` sweep:

- helm.rs: all 12 safe patterns (list, status, history, show,
  inspect, get, search, repo, dry-run, template, lint, diff) and
  all 4 destructive patterns (uninstall/delete, rollback, upgrade
  --force, upgrade --reset-values). Safe patterns use `\s+<sub>\b`
  to prevent flag-value bypass.

- kustomize.rs: all 4 safe patterns (build, kubectl kustomize,
  kustomize | kubectl diff, kustomize | kubectl --dry-run) and all
  3 destructive patterns (kustomize | kubectl delete, kubectl
  kustomize | kubectl delete, kubectl delete -k).

Added `helm_patterns_match_with_global_flags` and
`helm_safe_patterns_do_not_bypass_via_flag_value` regression tests
(helm.rs previously had none).

Full suite: 2,148 passed, 0 failed.
